name: mcp-context
description: Claude Code plugin that indexes large tool output into a searchable FTS5 knowledge base via PostToolUse hooks. No execution engine, no credentials, no network — just index and search.

scripts.test: npx tsx tests/store.test.ts && npx tsx tests/hook.test.ts && npx tsx tests/e2e.test.ts && npx tsx tests/enhancements.test.ts
